titleStmt.title: SII 40.181: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 181. (A.R. No. B. 316 of 1931.) Satrasāla, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar lying in front of the Śiva temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1025, Subhānu, Āshāḍha, śu. 1, Monday, corresponding to 1103 A.D., June 7.

Begining lost. Gives a long praśasti of Mandaḍi Rēvi Nāyaka and states that he set up the gods Bijjēśvaradēva, Muktēśvaradēva and Rēvēśvaradēva along with subsidiary deities and gifted some land at Satrasāla for conducting worship and offerings to the above deity and also gifted a feeding house in the temple with the premission of his master Dōraya-Bētabhūpāla.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tatpādapadmōpajīvi
svasti vijanāma pa titā
pudaśa prabhā māhi
ṣmati dēśa raṭṭaḍi samaddhigata sakala ja
nānudaṁ Āśrita vidvatkīramāka
ṁdahāra caraṇakamala ṣaṭcaraṇa
nannikābharaṇa nānādēśa bhūsura ra
kṣaṇadakṣa mādhyāhnakalpavikṣapati hi
tācārabōdhi sanivārasiddhi ḍu
¨rbbakya parivitaraṇa śakārānukūla
betugaṁḍanuḍidaṁtta gaṁḍahaiha
yarājya pratiṣṭācā¨ryya saṁtta
tōdā¨ryya māṟaṭagōtra pavitra ma
llavrōlipuravarādhīśvara śrīkāko
lanikēśadēva divya śrīpādapadmā
rādhaka parabalasādhaka nāmādhi sama
sta praśasti sahitulaina śrīmatu
maṁdaḍi rēvi nāyakuṁḍu dātukalyabda
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1025 gunēṁṭi
subhānu saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha śu 1
sōmavārāna bijjēśvaradēvarānu mu
ktēśvaradēvarānuṁ rēvēśvaradēvarānu
barivāra sahitamu bratiṣṭhasēsi haviba
la¨rccanalaku Aṁggaraṁggabhōgālaku sa¨rvvamā
na hitā¨rkkaṁba vāri satramunaku
kolayapāṭa kha 17 sēnu yi dā
nānakadhipati Īśānaśakti paṁḍituṁ
koḍugaḍi dhārāpū¨rvvakamugā
Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamugānicce kāmēśva
radēvaraṁ bratiṣṭhasēsi tannēlina dōra
yacēta bhūpālu sakāruṇyamu
baḍasi ceṁkamallani pāṭavaṁcikaṁ
ṭi polamēranaṁ pālavāya tū¨rpu
na gōlēṭidaramuna kha 12 sēnu U
ttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtti nimityāṁbuna
dhārāpū¨rvvakamu sēsina trasāla
lōni Aśēṣa suṁkamu dēvara dīpāna
ku Ācaṁdra¨rkkamugā Istimi .
dīniki haṁssadalaṁcinavāru gaṁ
gakaṟta sahasrakavilala vadhiṁcci
navāru dīni pratipāliṁccinavā
riki Akṣayapuṇyalōkālu . svada
ttā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattā
nupālanaṁ paradattāpahā
rēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
dēvadravyati Āddādyamaddasta
bhakṣaṁtti kūvaraḥ Aṣṭagotra
navitvarcātpaśāddavati kāra
vaṁ . karaṇamu rēlaparāju
vrālu maṁggaḷamahā śrī śrī
śrī .
Digital edition of SII 40.181 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
